arts.ttl: Is Weston McKennie playing for Juventus in the Champions League against PSV Eindhoven?
arts.sum: The 26-year-old has been restricted to just one substitute appearance in those four four league fixtures and he’s unlikely to start against PSV on Tuesday. Juventus begin their Champions League campaign today against PSV Eindhoven, returning to European soccer’s elite club competition after missing out in 2023/24.

arts.ttl: Chiellini represents Juventus at UEFA lunch with PSV officials
arts.sum: Giorgio Chiellini made his first public appearance as a Juventus executive, attending the traditional UEFA lunch hours before the Champions League match against PSV Eindhoven. The former Juventus captain and defender, who recently rejoined the club in a management role, represented the Italian giants alongside executive Francesco Calvo at the “Del Cambio” restaurant in Turin’s Piazza Carignano. Chiellini, who assumed the position of Head of Football Institutional Relations just yesterday, is working closely with CEO Maurizio Scanavino and President Gianluca Ferrero. His new role involves representing the club in relations with national and international football institutions. arts.ttl: Seedorf: “Real Madrid are favourites, but Inter, Milan and Juve can compete with the best”
arts.sum: The Champions League legend Clarence Seedorf shared his thoughts on the new format and top contenders for this season’s competition in an interview with La Gazzetta dello Sport. “I’m curious about the new format. I liked the previous one, as the anticipation for big matches was part of the spectacle. But let’s give the new format time to show how it works,” Seedorf said. When asked about the favorites, he stated: “History tells us that Real Madrid is the team to beat, but many can compete.
